name: tax-calculator-ai
description: Calculate income tax (UK/US brackets), EU VAT, UK corporation tax, and capital gains tax. Provides estimates only - not professional tax advice.

tools.name: calculate_income_tax
tools.description: Calculate income tax using UK or US progressive tax brackets.

tools.name: calculate_vat
tools.description: Calculate EU/UK VAT by country. Rate types: standard, reduced, zero.

tools.name: estimate_corporation_tax
tools.description: Estimate UK corporation tax including marginal relief calculations.

tools.name: calculate_capital_gains
tools.description: Calculate UK Capital Gains Tax. Asset types: residential, other.

tools.name: get_tax_deadlines
tools.description: Get upcoming tax filing and payment deadlines for UK or US.
